name: Tranquil Boots
description: While they increase the longevity of the wearer, this boot is not particularly reliable.

abilities.name: Break
abilities.description: Whenever the wielder attacks a hero or is attacked by a any unit, the boots' passive health regeneration bonus is lost, and the movement speed bonus is reduced for a while. Cooldown: 13. Move Speed Loss: 25. Health Regen Loss: 14. Duration: 13.
